message:
fix: enforce row/col constraints via Graphviz rank=same subgraphs

Row/col values were parsed in Zig but never translated to Graphviz
constraints, causing nodes to ignore grid positions entirely.

- Add rank=same subgraphs for each distinct row value
- Add invisible edges with constraint=false for column ordering
- Add inter-row invisible edges for vertical rank ordering
- Set constraint=false on real edges connecting same-row nodes
- New gviz_set_subgraph_attr C bridge using agsafeset (fixes agattr
  global-default bug that broke rank=same on all subgraphs)
- Skip Graphviz clusters when row constraints exist (cluster processing
  overrides rank=same; SDK computes group bounds from positions instead)
- Guard all insertion sorts with count>1 to prevent Zig range UB
